# tina4-php — LLM Context

Tina4 PHP v3.10.70. 54 built-in features, zero external dependencies. Web framework for PHP 8.2+.
Routes, ORM, templates, auth, queue, websocket, graphql, WSDL — all built in.

Install: composer require tina4stack/tina4php
Version: 3.10.70
Default port: 7146

---

## Router

Route files go in src/routes/ and are auto-discovered.

```php
use Tina4\Router;

Router::get("/api/users", function($request, $response) {
    return $response->json(["users" => []], 200);
});

Router::post("/api/users", function($request, $response) {
    $body = $request->body;
    return $response->json(["created" => $body["name"]], 201);
});

Router::get("/api/users/{id}", function($request, $response) {
    $id = $request->params["id"];
    return $response->json(["id" => $id]);
});

// Auth: POST/PUT/DELETE require auth by default
// Use ->noAuth() to make public
Router::post("/api/public", function($request, $response) {
    return $response->json(["open" => true]);
})->noAuth();

// Use ->secure() to protect a GET route
Router::get("/api/private", function($request, $response) {
    return $response->json(["secret" => true]);
})->secure();

// Template rendering
Router::get("/dashboard", function($request, $response) {
    return $response->template("dashboard.twig", ["title" => "Dashboard"]);
});

// Wildcard routes
Router::get("/api/files/*", function($request, $response) { ... });
```

---

## Database

```php
use Tina4\Database;

$db = Database::getConnection("sqlite:///app.db"); // or postgres://, mysql://, mssql://, firebird://

$result = $db->fetch("SELECT * FROM users WHERE active = ?", [true], 10, 0);
$row = $db->fetchOne("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?", [1]);
$db->execute("INSERT INTO users (name) VALUES (?)", ["Alice"]);
$db->insert("users", ["name" => "Alice"]);
$db->update("users", ["id" => 1, "name" => "Bob"]);
$db->delete("users", ["id" => 1]);
$nextId = $db->getNextId("users"); // race-safe atomic ID generation
```

---

## ORM

```php
class User extends \Tina4\ORM {
    public $tableName = "users";
    public $primaryKey = "id";

    public $id;
    public $name;
    public $email;
    public $createdAt;

    // Field mapping (snake_case DB → camelCase PHP)
    public $fieldMapping = [
        "created_at" => "createdAt"
    ];
}

// Usage
$user = new User();
$user->name = "Alice";
$user->save();

$user = (new User())->load("id = ?", [1]);
$user->delete();

$users = (new User())->select("*", "active = ?", [true], "name", 10, 0);
$user->asArray();  // to array
$user->asObject(); // to object
```

---

## Frond (Templates)

```php
use Tina4\Frond;

$html = Frond::render("page.twig", ["title" => "Home", "items" => $items]);
```

Templates use Twig syntax. Located in src/templates/.

---

## Auth

```php
use Tina4\Auth;

$token = Auth::getToken(["user_id" => 1, "role" => "admin"]);
$payload = Auth::validToken($token); // returns array or null
$hashed = Auth::hashPassword("secret");
$valid = Auth::checkPassword("secret", $hashed);
```

---

## Queue

```php
use Tina4\Queue;

$queue = new Queue("emails", 3); // topic, max_retries
$queue->push(["to" => "alice@example.com", "subject" => "Hello"]);

foreach ($queue->consume("emails") as $job) {
    process($job->payload);
    $job->complete(); // or $job->fail("reason")
}

$queue->produce("other_topic", ["data" => "value"]);
$dead = $queue->deadLetters();
```

Backends: file (default), RabbitMQ, Kafka, MongoDB — configured via TINA4_QUEUE_BACKEND env var.

---

## API Client

```php
use Tina4\Api;

$api = new Api("https://api.example.com");
$result = $api->get("/users"); // returns ["httpCode" => 200, "body" => [...]]
$api->post("/users", ["name" => "Alice"]);
$api->setBearerToken("token123");
```

---

## Events

```php
use Tina4\Events;

Events::on("user.created", function($user) {
    echo "Welcome {$user['name']}";
});

Events::emit("user.created", ["name" => "Alice"]);
Events::once("app.ready", function() { echo "Started!"; });
```

---

## Migration

```php
use Tina4\Migration;

Migration::migrate($db);
Migration::create("add users table");
```

SQL files in migrations/ directory.

---

## Project Structure

```
src/
  routes/       # Auto-discovered route files
  orm/          # ORM model definitions
  templates/    # Frond/Twig templates
  public/       # Static files served at /
  app/          # Shared helpers and services
  services/     # Service layer classes
migrations/     # SQL migration files
tests/          # PHPUnit test files
vendor/         # Composer dependencies
index.php       # Entry point
.env            # Environment variables
```

---

## Entry Point (index.php)

```php
<?php
require_once "./vendor/autoload.php";
$app = new \Tina4\App(basePath: __DIR__, development: true);
$app->start();
```

---

## Known Gotchas

1. Route methods are static: `Router::get()` not `$router->get()`
2. POST/PUT/DELETE require auth by default. Chain `->noAuth()` to make public
3. GET is public by default. Chain `->secure()` to protect
4. ORM uses `asArray()` not `toArray()` for array conversion
5. Database `fetch()` params are positional: `fetch(sql, params, limit, offset)` not named
6. Queue job payload accessed via `$job->payload` not `$job->data`
7. Import via `use Tina4\ClassName` — PSR-4 autoloading
8. Templates are Twig syntax (not Blade, not PHP)
9. Default port: 7146
10. `$response->json()` not `response()` — PHP uses method call
